rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use visible identifiers in AGREE expressions; do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
generic_rules: Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use valid AGREE syntax inside annex agree blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written as annex agree {** ... **};
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
